recommendations.title: A Perfect Man
recommendations.overview: A struggling writer finds a shortcut to fame, but a blackmailer threatens to ruin his perfect life.

recommendations.title: Burn Out
recommendations.overview: Tony, a promising young motorcycle racer, is forced to do perilous drug runs to save the mother of his child from a dangerous mobster.

recommendations.title: Black Box
recommendations.overview: Mathieu is a young and talented black box analyst on a mission to solve the reason behind the deadly crash of a brand new aircraft. Yet, when the case is closed by authorities, Mathieu cannot help but sense there is something wrong with the evidence.

recommendations.title: Visions
recommendations.overview: An experienced airline pilot, Estelle leads a perfect life between long-haul flights with her loving, protective husband Guillaume. One day, by chance, in an airport corridor, she crosses paths with Ana, a photographer with whom she had a passionate

recommendations.title: Caged
recommendations.overview: Somewhere in Eastern Europe. Carole is a young nurse with a humanitarian aid group that has reached the end of its mission. But just then, the young woman and her two colleagues are kidnapped by strangers for mysterious reasons. Held captive, cared f

recommendations.title: A Streetcar Named Desire
recommendations.overview: A disturbed, aging Southern belle moves in with her sister for solace — but being face-to-face with her brutish brother-in-law accelerates her downward spiral.

recommendations.title: The Scent of the Night
recommendations.overview: A former policeman turns full-time robber and goes on a downward spiral of crime in 1970s Rome.

recommendations.title: Amy
recommendations.overview: A documentary on the life of Amy Winehouse, the immensely talented yet doomed songstress. We see her from her teen years, where she already showed her singing abilities, to her finding success and then her downward spiral into alcoholism and drugs.

recommendations.title: An Elephant Sitting Still

recommendations.title: Green Street Hooligans
